content:
# Groundwater Flow

**Summary**: The movement of groundwater through an aquifer.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012]] developed a groundwater flow model to predict the impact of pumping on the UER aquifer.

- [[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019]] analyzed the impact of extraction on the flow and storage of the UER and Dammam systems.

- [[2022-karami|Karami, 2022]] analyzed the hydrogeology of the Wadi Al Sirhan Basin.

- [[2022-pambudi|Pambudi, 2022]] analyzed artificial recharge (AR) and aquifer storage & recovery (ASR).

- [[2024-ahmad|Ahmad, 2024]] modeled groundwater flow to determine the impact of pumping and recharge on aquifer health.

- [[1995-hasan|Hasan, 1995]] analyzed the groundwater flow patterns to assess the impact of overpumping on water quality in the region.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012]] Understanding flow is essential for predicting how pumping affects the water table and pressure.

- [[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019]] analyzed the impact of extraction on the flow and storage of the UER and Dammam systems.

- [[2022-karami|Karami, 2022]] analyzed the hydrogeology of the Wadi Al Sirhan Basin.

- [[2022-pambudi|Pambudi, 2022]] analyzed artificial recharge (AR) and aquifer storage & recovery (ASR).

- [[2024-ahmad|Ahmad, 2024]] modeled groundwater flow to determine the impact of pumping and recharge on aquifer health.

- [[1995-hasan|Hasan, 1995]] analyzed the groundwater flow patterns to assess the impact of overpumping on water quality in the region.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012]] Numerical simulation using finite difference equations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The model was calibrated using data from 1967 to 2010 and successfully predicted head changes. ([[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012, p. 15]])

- Not stated in source ([[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019]])

- Groundwater flow in the study area comes from the southern part toward the northern parts. ([[2022-karami|Karami, 2022, p. 24]])

- Aquifer Storage & Recovery (ASR) is a significant approach for managing and restoring water resources that could provide water to the community. ([[2022-pambudi|Pambudi, 2022, p. 13]])

- Steady-state conditions were assumed for initial modeling due to constant annual recharge and pumping rates. ([[2024-ahmad|Ahmad, 2024, p. 30]])

- analyzed the groundwater flow patterns to assess the impact of overpumping on water quality in the region. ([[1995-hasan|Hasan, 1995]])
